headline: Trump said $92 oil was 'only' high and would drop 'very big.' Oil tanked 9% in hours — but the clock is ticking
summary: After the president told Fox Business he'd be 'very surprised' if crude stayed at $92, Iran declared the Strait of Hormuz 'completely open.' There's a catch.

headline: U.S. extends Russian oil sanctions waiver amid global supply squeeze
summary: Investing.com -- In a sudden shift in policy, the Trump administration on Friday issued a fresh, month-long sanctions waiver allowing countries to purchase Russian oil and petroleum products already at sea.

headline: Morgan Stanley Trims Exxon Mobil (XOM) Target Ahead of Q1, Sees Limited Upside in Energy Prices
summary: Exxon Mobil Corporation (NYSE:XOM) is included among the Top 10 Reddit Stocks That Will Skyrocket. On April 17, Morgan Stanley lowered its price recommendation on Exxon Mobil Corporation (NYSE:XOM) to $171 from $172. It reiterated an Overweight rating on the shares. Heading into Q1 earnings, the firm said most exploration and production companies are likely […]

headline: Conflict in the Middle East: Is another show of resilience likely?
summary: Investing.com -- Analysts at Citi believe the global economy is well-positioned to weather a severe disruption in the Middle East, suggesting that the "momentum" of households and firms may once again prevent a slide into a deep recession despite significant headwinds from energy costs.
